findings.message: Breaking schema change: the `Item.name` field was renamed to `title` with no backwards-compatible path. Any existing GraphQL client selecting `name` will now get a validation error, and the field's data simply moved under a new name. This is a removal-by-rename of a public schema field.
findings.suggestion: Keep `name` and add `title` as an additive field (e.g. expose both, with `title` resolving from the same source), or deprecate `name` via `@strawberry.field(deprecation_reason=...)` before removing it in a later, announced breaking release. Avoid renaming public fields in place.
